nasb.text: It happened that when He went into the house of one of the leaders of the Pharisees on the Sabbath to eat bread, they were watching Him closely.

esv.text: One Sabbath, when he went to dine at the house of a ruler of the Pharisees, they were watching him carefully.

cnv.text: 在安息日，耶穌進了一個法利賽人領袖的家裡吃飯，眾人都在窺探他。

ccb.text: 有个安息日，耶稣到一位法利赛人的首领家里作客，人们密切地监视祂。

csbs.text: 有一个安息日，耶稣到一个法利赛人的首领家里去吃饭，他们密切注意着耶稣。
